title: GEEPAS Electric Insect Killer Powerful UV Fly Zapper for Flies, Moth, Mosquitoes & Wasps For Indoor Use | 20m² Coverage | Removable Washable Tray | Chemical-Free Pest Control | Bug Catcher, 4W
features: ✅ EFFECTIVE BUG CONTROL – The Geepas 4W Electric Bug Zapper efficiently eliminates mosquitoes, flies, and other insects, ensuring a pest-free environment. Ideal for indoor use in homes, kitchens, and restaurants.

✅ 4W UV INSECT ATTRACTION TECHNOLOGY - Features an energy-efficient 4W ultraviolet tube that powerfully attracts mosquitoes, flies, and moths while using less electricity. Eco-friendly design saves energy without compromising effectiveness - ideal for homes and offices.

✅ WIDE 20M² COVERAGE & REPLACEABLE BULBS – The ultraviolet light attracts insects from up to 20M² away, ensuring maximum pest control. The replaceable UV tubes provide long-term performance, keeping your space insect-free.
✅ CHEMICAL-FREE & ODOURLESS INSECT CONTROL –This eco-friendly fly killer operates without chemicals, making it safe for homes with children, pets, and allergy sufferers.

✅ WALL-MOUNTABLE OR FREE-STANDING DESIGN – Designed for versatile use, this lightweight bug zapper can be hung on a wall (chain included) or placed on a flat surface, providing flexible positioning for maximum effectiveness.

✅ DURABLE, LOW-NOISE & ENERGY-EFFICIENT – Featuring a sturdy, lightweight design, this low-noise insect zapper operates quietly, making it ideal for bedrooms, offices, and restaurants. The energy-saving UV tubes ensure efficient performance with minimal power consumption.
description: Product Description ULTRA VIOLET LIGHT Featuring a powerful 6W ultra-violet tube, this insect killer emits UV light that attracts insects with remarkable precision. HANGING FEATURE This is useful for placing the device in strategic locations. EASY CLEANING Removable tray at the bottom to collect the dead insects. ODOURLESS Absence of any strong or unpleasant smell associated with the device's operation. SAFETY FEATURES Protective outer casing or a grid that is inaccessible to humans and pets. PET FRIENDLY There are no toxic fumes or unpleasant odors emitted from the fly killer, so its pets friendly. DURABLE MATERIAL This pest control device is designed to efficiently and durable material. LOW NOISE This ensures the bug zapper trap operates quietly.
